company.name: Bogen.ai
company.valueProposition: We turn chaos into clarity by giving you AI systems that do the work for you, not with you.
company.mission: Build AI-powered business systems for real estate professionals, service-based businesses, and entrepreneurs
company.differentiator: Built by a luxury real estate professional who actually runs a high-volume business, not just a tech consultant
coreValues: Ethical innovation - transparent, responsible use of AI
Relationship-first - tech serves people, not the other way around
Revenue integrity - focus on work that actually moves dollars

primary: Real estate agents, teams, and brokers (especially luxury)
Service-based professionals (organizers, coaches, consultants, attorneys, CPAs)
Small business owners and entrepreneurs ($250K-$5M+ revenue)
targetCustomers.idealProfile: Already successful but hitting a time or scaling ceiling, has lead flow but inconsistent follow-up, overwhelmed by tools and AI options
commonPainPoints: Know they should use AI but don't know where to start
Losing deals because can't respond fast enough

mastermind.name: Edmund's Mastermind
mastermind.description: Weekly, implementation-focused mastermind for real estate professionals and service-based business owners
mastermind.format: Live teaching, hot-seat coaching, AI tools, copy-paste assets

nextSession.title: Stop Wasting 15 Hours Weekly on AI - Master Consistency Systems
nextSession.description: Master AI systems that achieve 90%+ first-draft usability and reclaim 15+ hours weekly. Stop spending 30 minutes wrestling with AI for one usable output. The top 1% have built systems that produce perfect first drafts automatically.

mastermind.idealMember: Doing $250K-$5M+ revenue, overwhelmed by systems/tech but hungry to implement, has leads but leaves money on table
benefits: Systems & templates for lead follow-up and content
mastermind.joinProcess: Visit mastermind page, fill out application, optional strategy call, join and get onboarding

tracks.name: Referral Partners
tracks.description: Send qualified leads, earn commission on setup fees and recurring revenue

tracks.name: Implementation Partners
tracks.description: Get trained to deliver systems using Bogen.ai methodology, higher commission tiers

contact.callToAction: The best next step is a 30-minute strategy call with Edmund. He'll look at your specific business and tell you what makes sense (and what doesn't).

aiPrinciples: AI amplifies intelligence; it doesn't replace it
Early adopters gain 18-24 months of advantage
Revenue-first automation: lead follow-up > CRM cleanup > content
Relationships are still the real currency
60-70% of work can be automated; 30-40% must stay human

timelines.build: Weeks 2-3: Build systems, integrate, early testing
timelines.training: Weeks 3-4: Train team, soft launch, optimization
